prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "1C. Cybersecurity" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 2. Properties".
Find where Item 1C ends: right before the "Item 2" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 1C that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
• Recent cyber risks and cybersecurity developments
• Cyber security threats
• Assessments by third-party experts
• Key cyber risk metrics
• Projects and initiatives
